name: 有何鮭干
desc: 基底：白米蛋白質：生食級干貝、生鮭魚配菜：柚香蘿蔔、鴻禧菇、毛豆、番茄、花椰菜風味：和風油醋點綴：蝦味魚卵、海苔絲、黑白芝麻

name: 蝦仁餐盒
desc: 可自選基底、菜盤及醬料，並加購任意蛋白質；點綴則固定為黑白芝麻、海苔絲。【本週菜盤】A - 碎蛋、玉米粒、地瓜葉、毛豆、醃蘿蔔B - 碎蛋、番茄、花椰菜、空心菜、海帶絲＊請注意：若於餐點製作過程時，遇菜盤中配菜剛好完售之情形，將隨機更換配菜，再請多多包涵，謝謝！

name: 辣拌鮪魚餐盒
desc: Customize your base, veggie mix, and sauce, and add any protein of your choice. Toppings are fixed: black and white sesame seeds, and shredded nori.[This Week's Veggie Mixes]A - Chopped egg, sweet corn, sweet potato leaves, edamame, and pickled radish.B - Chopped egg, tomato, broccoli, water spinach, and shredded kelp.＊Note: If a specific side dish is sold out during preparation, it will be randomly substituted with another option. Thank you for your understanding!

name: 我就菜
